title: It's a Girl Clear Latex Balloon with Pink Confetti (30cm) Pack of 6 - Perfect for Baby Shower and Gender Reveal Celebrations
features: IT'S A GIRL CLEAR LATEX BALLOON: Celebrate the arrival of your little bundle of joy in style with these high-quality, crystal-clear latex balloons; perfect for your baby shower or gender reveal party.
BEAUTIFUL PINK CONFETTI: Each balloon is filled with dazzling pink confetti, adding a pop of color and excitement to your celebration while revealing the joyful news to family and friends.
IMPRESSIVE SIZE: At 30cm in diameter when inflated, these balloons captivate the attention of guests and add a festive atmosphere to any space with their impressive size and eye-catching design.
PACK OF 6: This convenient pack of six ensures you have enough balloons to create a stunning display or bouquet, making for unforgettable memories and picture-perfect moments to cherish.

PERFECT FOR VARIOUS CELEBRATIONS: From baby showers to gender reveal parties to homecoming celebrations, these versatile balloons with pink confetti create the ultimate festive environment for any special occasion welcoming a new baby girl into the world.
description: Product Description Have the most memorable party with your friends and family by decorating with these balloons featuring clear latex printed with an "It's A Girl" headline designed with pink confetti. These balloons will add a warm atmosphere to your party. Box Contains 1 x 6 CLR 12" GRL BLN W/PINK CONFT
